policy_object_relationship: Policy Object governs dispatch and handoff behavior; Dispatcher hosts the mechanism locally
hosted_mechanism_scope: dispatch policy;registry readiness gating;handoff behavior;dispatcher boundary discipline
must_expose: administrative policy assignment surface;managerial dispatch mechanism host surface;safe-point replacement compatibility
must_preserve: Dispatcher remains actor;Policy Object remains semantic governor;Registry / Delivery Port remains contract surface
must_not_do: execute Policy Object as external object;allow Policy Object to replace Dispatcher;accept policy bundle directly through consuming ingress;own registry internals
notes: Dispatcher is policy-consuming because dispatch/handoff behavior can be governed by assigned Policy Object semantics.

policy_object_relationship: Policy Object governs writing/feed round selection and progression behavior; Round Manager hosts the mechanism locally
hosted_mechanism_scope: writing round selection;writable readiness;writing waiting-list ordering;queue-container identifier handling
must_expose: administrative assignment surface;writing/feed mechanism host surface;safe-point replacement compatibility
must_preserve: waiting lists store queue-container identifiers;writing and delivery managers remain distinct
must_not_do: store envelopes in waiting list;act as Queue Bundle Agent;collapse writing and delivery round domains
notes: Writing / Feeding Round Manager is a policy-consuming component for writing-side progression semantics.

policy_object_relationship: Policy Object governs delivery round progression behavior; Round Manager hosts the mechanism locally
hosted_mechanism_scope: delivery round progression;delivery waiting-list ordering;queue-container ID requalification path
must_expose: administrative assignment surface;delivery progression mechanism host surface;safe-point replacement compatibility
must_preserve: delivery waiting list stores queue-container identifiers;requalified queue-container IDs return to correct waiting list
must_not_do: store envelopes in waiting list;replace Dispatcher;collapse with Writing / Feeding Round Manager
notes: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager is policy-consuming for delivery-side progression semantics.

policy_object_relationship: Policy Object governs queue bundle orchestration and ordering semantics; Queue Bundle Agent hosts the mechanism locally
hosted_mechanism_scope: queue bundle orchestration;policy-conforming queue order;operational realization over queue structures;queue-container terminology discipline
must_expose: administrative assignment surface;bundle orchestration mechanism host surface;safe-point replacement compatibility
must_preserve: Queue Bundle Agent operates over bundles;Single Queue Moderator operates over one queue-container;Queue equals Container
must_not_do: replace Single Queue Moderator;moderate one queue-container directly;create runtime container above Queue Container;store envelopes in waiting lists
notes: Queue Bundle Agent is policy-consuming for bundle-level orchestration and ordering behavior.

policy_object_relationship: Policy Object governs moderation and requalification semantics; Single Queue Moderator hosts the mechanism locally
hosted_mechanism_scope: single queue-container moderation;slot lifecycle;envelope-slot occupancy;waiting discipline restoration;queue-container requalification
must_expose: administrative assignment surface;single queue moderation mechanism host surface;safe-point replacement compatibility
must_preserve: occupancy is binding/state not envelope lifecycle ownership;Single Queue Moderator operates over one queue-container
must_not_do: replace Queue Bundle Agent;own envelope lifecycle after registry handoff;store envelopes in waiting lists
notes: Single Queue Moderator is policy-consuming for moderation and requalification behavior.

policy_object_relationship: Policy Object may govern timestamp stabilization semantics; Timestamp Stabilizer hosts timestamp mechanism locally
hosted_mechanism_scope: timestamp stabilization policy semantics;mandatory timestamp participation across ingress families
must_expose: administrative assignment surface;timestamp mechanism host surface;safe-point replacement compatibility;mandatory ingress timestamp participation
must_preserve: Timestamp Stabilizer is mature and mandatory;timestamp participates in validating and hot-path flows
must_not_do: remain placeholder;be optional in hot-path;replace Metadata Injector;execute Policy Object externally
notes: Timestamp Stabilizer is policy-consuming only for mechanism semantics; timestamp preparation also requires EN-FAM-009.

policy_object_relationship: Policy Object may govern validation semantics; Validator hosts validation mechanism locally
hosted_mechanism_scope: validating-ingress validation semantics;validation candidate acceptance/rejection rules
must_expose: administrative assignment surface;validation mechanism host surface;safe-point replacement compatibility;validating-ingress-only discipline
must_preserve: Validator participates only where validation authority is assembler-local
must_not_do: participate in hot-path externalized validation;replace Envelope Assembler;validate arbitrary runtime envelopes outside its path
notes: Validator is policy-consuming for validation semantics, but is restricted to validating ingress.

policy_object_relationship: Metadata is schema/directive-governed; Metadata Injector does not host Policy Object mechanisms
hosted_mechanism_scope: metadata directive application;schema-guided metadata field update;metadata-to-envelope composition support
assignment_mediator_name: PolicyAssigner does not assign Policy Object to Metadata Injector
must_expose: metadata directive receiving compatibility;metadata schema application;metadata-to-envelope composition support
must_preserve: Metadata authority remains administrative;Metadata Injector is schema/directive-governed;metadata is composed into Log Level Envelope
must_not_do: use EN-FAM-002;host Policy Object mechanisms;be counted as policy-consuming component;bypass administrative metadata authority
notes: Explicit exclusion row: Metadata Injector is not policy-consuming.

policy_object_relationship: PolicyAssigner assigns Policy Objects but does not host the assigned mechanism semantics itself
hosted_mechanism_scope: policy intake;assignment readiness;target assignment;safe-point replacement mediation
must_expose: policy bundle intake mediation;Policy Object identity tracking;assignment readiness tracking;safe-point replacement coordination
must_preserve: PolicyAssigner mediates assignment;host components realize mechanisms
must_not_do: execute target component behavior;replace policy-consuming component;turn Policy Object into executable implementation
notes: PolicyAssigner is a policy mediator, not a policy-consuming mechanism host.

policy_object_relationship: Administrative / Ecosystem Port receives policy bundles but does not host Policy Object mechanisms
hosted_mechanism_scope: administrative/ecosystem payload entry;policy bundle receiving;admin/control contract enforcement
must_preserve: policies enter through administrative path;PolicyAssigner performs assignment;content ingress remains separate
must_not_do: host mechanism semantics;replace PolicyAssigner;receive normal log content as policy;collapse with consuming ingress
notes: Administrative / Ecosystem Port is entry surface, not policy host.

policy_object_relationship: Envelope Assembler composes Validator, Metadata Injector, and Timestamp Stabilizer but is not itself a Policy Object host in this index
assignment_mediator_name: PolicyAssigner only assigns policies to composed eligible policy-consuming components where applicable
must_expose: typed template ingress;validating/hot-path distinction;envelope realization;composition of preparation components
must_preserve: Validator and Timestamp Stabilizer may be policy-consuming;Metadata Injector remains schema/directive-governed
must_not_do: host metadata policy;replace Assembler Ingress Port;turn raw content into runtime carrier without envelope
notes: Envelope Assembler is a contract-side composite; policy hosting belongs to eligible composed components, not the composite as a whole.
